title: Outlook integration - creating item from email with partial conditions
excerpt:

posts.author: linaed (Linae)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to use outlook integration and create an item to a group from a specific email. However, the integration requires the condition to be exact.

But I just want certain words in the email subject to then create an item. Otherwise it would be overkill.

For example, email subject " Client Name, Super Fund, Purchasing Property -Task", I wanted the values “Client Name” and “Task” to create an item but it appears the subject needs to be the exact words of the specified condition to work.

Is there a work around this? I have used Subject + includes + value
